_policy: Before calling run_show, look up the command category here. If an MCP tool covers it, use that tool instead. run_show is ONLY for commands absent from this map. An empty result from any MCP tool means the feature is not configured on the device — it does NOT mean the query is unsupported. Never fall back to run_show after an empty MCP tool result.

get_routing.notes: Pass prefix=<ip> for targeted lookup, omit for full table. iOS asyncssh CLI: prefix appended to command string.

ping.notes: Params: device, destination. Optional: source, vrf. All devices use SSH CLI.

traceroute.notes: Params: device, destination. Optional: source, vrf. All devices use SSH CLI.

_vrf_note: All protocol/routing/operational tools accept an optional vrf parameter. If omitted, the global routing table is used. The vrf parameter is available for future L3VPN deployments. IOS asyncssh CLI tools use dual-entry format; c8000v RESTCONF tools use URL paths.
